about_bio: Born on October 10, 1997, in Istanbul. I began my hairdressing career at a young age and have been immersed in this profession for over 16 years. Throughout this journey, I have developed my skills by working in different salons and gained extensive salon management experience for approximately 7 years, allowing me to understand the industry not only as a practitioner but also from a management perspective.
about_vision_text: To be an innovative, inspiring brand that makes a difference in the beauty industry.
about_mission_text: To provide every client with quality, reliable service that makes them feel truly special.
af_model_text: We determine together and meticulously create the style that suits you best.
af_glow_text: Latest techniques and premium products to achieve your dream color.
af_health_text: Specialized care for healthy, lustrous hair from roots to ends, inside and out.
af_online_text: Book appointments and purchase services online, anytime, anywhere.
svc_haircut_desc: Personalized styling including wash and blow-dry.
svc_color_desc: Ombre, Sombre, Balayage and other treatments.

order_contact_desc: You can reach us via Instagram or by phone.
